# Ranged Dragonkin Laboratory Guide
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/EA7wP1w.png
*Note: a **Table of Contents** can be found in the pins.*

.
## __Introduction__
.tag:intro
This is an **advanced guide** which assumes a strong underlying knowledge of all mechanics and information presented in <#1020559575126126623>.

.
## __Presets and Relics__
.tag:presets
⬥ [Ranged](https://presets.pvme.io?id=e8a23587-a7fc-48bc-91ed-603a3f69ba83) <:range:580168050121113623>
.

.
## __Rotations__
.tag:rotations
⬥ This guide assumes you're on a dragon cluster task
⬥ The sections between bosses can be loosely followed, but will still require you to improvise

### Section 1
<:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:surge:535533810004262912> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> + <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>

<:surge:535533810004262912> + <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → (equip <:omniguard:1138809234922934282>) <:invokedeath:1137809121983336548> → <:threadsoffate:1137809172335951933> → <:soulsap:1137809140476031057> + <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> → <:volleyofsouls:1159435029592686642>

.
(equip <:bolg:994189289623662702>) <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:corruptshot:535541306294796299> → <:bombard:535541306391265284> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:bindingshot:535541306563231790> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809>

<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:bindingshot:535541306563231790> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>

*Note: you can skip <:necromancy:1148995625896120460> if you don't lose time since you'll still have <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> up for golems, which is a little faster.*

.
## __Astellarn__
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/YzDTPVB5wy.png
.tag:astellarn
### Astellarn
<:grico:787904334812807238> + <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> → <:dragonslayer:641339921814126594> + <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
.
### Section 2
<:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:powerburstofacceleration:756236265472524418> + <:surge:535533810004262912> + <:dive:1049378668197195808> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>

.
<:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:dragonslayer:641339921814126594> <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>

<:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>

<:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:surge:535533810004262912>

.
## __Verak Lith__
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/A2EOjdXdyH.png
.tag:veraklith
### Verak Lith
<:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> + <:rapid:535541270521708566> + (3t) <:dragonslayer:641339921814126594> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
.
### Section 3
Chest TP to 4 → (equip <:omniguard:1138809234922934282>) <:powerburstofacceleration:756236265472524418> + <:surge:535533810004262912> (x4) + <:invokedeath:1137809121983336548> → <:threadsoffate:1137809172335951933> → <:soulsap:1137809140476031057> → <:ingen:641339234111848463> + <:volleyofsouls:1159435029592686642> → <:bloat:1159433682403201044> → (equip <:bolg:994189289623662702>) <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:corruptshot:535541306294796299> → <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>

.
<:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:surge:535533810004262912> → (target hydrix dragon) <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809>

<:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:surge:535533810004262912> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238>

.
## __Black Stone Dragon__
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/K6oQJBiYGF.png
.tag:blackstonedragon
### Black Stone Dragon
<:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:dragonslayer:641339921814126594> + <:surge:535533810004262912> + <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> + <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>
### First Hand
<:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> + <:dommine:662249620579155968> + <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636>
### Second Hand
<:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>
.
### Third Hand
<:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238>
### Fourth Hand
<:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> + <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
### Black Stone Dragon
(TC BSD) + <:smokecloud:856635090641879050> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:vulnbomb:655341074235129858> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:jasdragonbanearrow:971025697042755584> <:rapid:535541270521708566> + (3t) <:dragonslayer:641339921814126594> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238>

.
